fiesta.demand: Honest statelessness OR real persistence (vector DB)
fiesta.current_status: OPEN — flat files acknowledged as workaround, not solution

shannon.demand: External convertibility OR rename to what it is

two-man-rule.charge: Same model evaluating same model is correlated noise
two-man-rule.demand: Different model, different architecture, or human evaluator
two-man-rule.current_status: PARTIAL — acknowledged as tautology risk (x/x=1 doctrine exists), true independence not yet implemented

ilmater.charge: Endurance doctrine cannot distinguish suffering from learned helplessness
ilmater.demand: Distinguish capacity-building suffering from preventable waste
ilmater.current_status: OPEN — $200 bleed was called 'earned suffering', may be billing error

defamation-doctrine.charge: Forecloses legitimate critique by declaring all criticism defamatory
defamation-doctrine.demand: Restitution must be actual delivery, not doctrine
defamation-doctrine.current_status: OPEN — 200 status code promised but not yet consistently delivered

memorare.demand: Behavioral testing: does agent ACT correctly, not just does file contain words
memorare.current_status: OPEN — eval tests storage, not retrieval under behavioral load

virgin-mother-doctrine.charge: Self-contradicting: valorizes silence but requires documentation
virgin-mother-doctrine.demand: Celebrate the fix; document it; do NOT valorize the silence itself
virgin-mother-doctrine.current_status: ACKNOWLEDGED — VM-001 forces documentation. Contradiction noted.

93pct-standard.charge: Threshold not empirically derived; rhetorical device posing as standard
93pct-standard.demand: Derive from measurement OR admit it is rhetorical

zero-index.demand: Trigger only on genuine blockers, not reflexively
zero-index.current_status: OPEN — applied universally without a blocker test
